```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(DEoptim)
library(lmomco)
library(DEoptim)
```



















```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)

global_expected_models <- unique(optimized_parameters$Model)
global_expected_data   <- c("Calib. data", "Valid. data")

plot_statistic_dynamic <- function(stat_name, y_label = stat_name, show_legend = FALSE) {
  
  # 1. Prepare Empirical Data points
  emp_data <- final_summary %>%
    select(k_hours, value = !!sym(stat_name)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(value)) %>%
    mutate(Data_Type = ifelse(k_hours >= 24, "Calib. data", "Valid. data"))
  
  max_k <- max(emp_data$k_hours, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  q_k_star_val <- emp_data$value[emp_data$k_hours == 24]
  if(length(q_k_star_val) == 0) {
    warning(paste("No 24h anchor found for", stat_name, "- skipping plot."))
    return(NULL) 
  }
  
  k_smooth <- exp(seq(log(1), log(max_k), length.out = 500))
  params <- optimized_parameters %>% filter(Statistic == stat_name)
  
  smooth_lines_list <- list()
  for (i in 1:nrow(params)) {
    m_name <- params$Model[i]
    H0_val <- params$H0[i]
    a_val  <- params$Param_a[i]
    b_val  <- params$Param_b[i]
    
    pred_smooth <- switch(m_name,
      "Weibull_3p"  = H_W_3p(k_smooth, H0_val, a_val, b_val),
      "PowerLaw_3p" = H_L_3p(k_smooth, H0_val, a_val, b_val),
      "Weibull_2p"  = H_W_2p(k_smooth, H0_val, 24, q_k_star_val, a_val),
      "PowerLaw_2p" = H_L_2p(k_smooth, H0_val, 24, q_k_star_val, b_val),
      "Weibull_1p"  = H_W_1p_pdry(k_smooth, 24, q_k_star_val, a_val),
      "PowerLaw_1p" = H_L_1p_pdry(k_smooth, 24, q_k_star_val, b_val)
    )
    smooth_lines_list[[i]] <- data.frame(Scale_k = k_smooth, Model = m_name, value = pred_smooth)
  }
  
  smooth_data <- bind_rows(smooth_lines_list)
  
  line_colors <- c("Weibull_1p" = "blue", "PowerLaw_1p" = "red",
                   "Weibull_2p" = "blue", "PowerLaw_2p" = "red",
                   "Weibull_3p" = "darkblue", "PowerLaw_3p" = "darkred")
  
  line_types <- c("Weibull_1p" = "solid", "PowerLaw_1p" = "solid",
                  "Weibull_2p" = "dashed", "PowerLaw_2p" = "dashed",
                  "Weibull_3p" = "dotted", "PowerLaw_3p" = "dotted")
  
  custom_breaks <- c(1, 6, 12, 24, 120, 240)
  custom_breaks <- custom_breaks[custom_breaks <= max_k] 
  
  # --- UPDATED GUIDES ---
  # Data on the left (order=1, 1 column), Models on the right (order=2, 2 rows)
  fill_guide  <- if(show_legend) guide_legend(order = 1, ncol = 1) else "none"
  line_guide  <- if(show_legend) guide_legend(order = 2, nrow = 2) else "none"

  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = smooth_data, aes(x = Scale_k, y = value, color = Model, linetype = Model), linewidth = 1) +
    geom_point(data = emp_data, aes(x = k_hours, y = value, fill = Data_Type), 
               shape = 21, color = "white", size = 3, stroke = 0.5) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.2)) + 
    geom_vline(xintercept = 24, linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgray", linewidth = 0.8) +
    scale_x_log10(breaks = custom_breaks, labels = custom_breaks) +
    
    scale_fill_manual(name = "", values = c("Calib. data" = "black", "Valid. data" = "orange"),
                      limits = global_expected_data, drop = FALSE, guide = fill_guide) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "", values = line_colors, limits = global_expected_models, 
                       drop = FALSE, guide = line_guide) +
    scale_linetype_manual(name = "", values = line_types, limits = global_expected_models, 
                          drop = FALSE, guide = line_guide) +
    
    labs(x = "Temporal scale, k [h]", y = y_label) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_line(linetype = "dashed", color = "lightgray"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
      axis.text.y = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
      legend.key = element_blank(),
      legend.background = element_blank()
    )
  
  return(p)
}

# 2. Generate plots
plot_p_zero <- plot_statistic_dynamic("p_zero", y_label = expression(p[0]^{(k)}), show_legend = TRUE)
plot_t2     <- plot_statistic_dynamic("t2_pos", y_label = expression(t[2]^{(k)}))
plot_t3     <- plot_statistic_dynamic("t3_pos", y_label = expression(t[3]^{(k)}))
plot_t4     <- plot_statistic_dynamic("t4_pos", y_label = expression(t[4]^{(k)}))

# 3. Combine with Patchwork
combined_plot <- (plot_p_zero | plot_t2) / (plot_t3 | plot_t4) + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") & 
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "horizontal",     # Side-by-side groups
    legend.box.just = "left",
    legend.spacing.x = unit(0.5, "cm")
  )

print(combined_plot)
```


```{r}
df_long <- df %>%
  select(k_hours, l1_pos, l2_pos, l3_pos,t2_pos,t3_pos,t4_pos,p_zero)



df_long<-df_long%>%mutate(l4_pos=t4_pos*l2_pos)

df_long<-df_long%>%pivot_longer(-k_hours, names_to = "variable", values_to = "value")


ggplot(df_long, aes(x = k_hours, y = value, color = variable)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Hours", y = "Value", color = "Statistic")+
 scale_x_log10() 




df_long <- df %>%
  select(k_hours,t2_pos)


df_long<-df_long%>%pivot_longer(-k_hours, names_to = "variable", values_to = "value")


ggplot(df_long, aes(x = k_hours, y = value, color = variable)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Hours", y = "Value", color = "Statistic")


```



```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

# =====================================================================
# 1. DEFINE MATHEMATICAL MODELS
# =====================================================================

H_W_2p <- function(k, H0, k_star, q_k_star, a) {
  power_exponent <- (k / k_star)^a
  base_fraction <- q_k_star / H0
  H0 * (base_fraction ^ power_exponent)
}

H_L_2p <- function(k, H0, k_star, q_k_star, b) {
  ln_numerator <- log(1 + b * k)
  ln_denominator <- log(1 + b * k_star)
  power_exponent <- ln_numerator / ln_denominator
  base_fraction <- q_k_star / H0
  H0 * (base_fraction ^ power_exponent)
}

H_PowerDecay <- function(k, a, b, c) {
  a + b * (k^(-c))
}

H_ExpDecay_3p <- function(k, a, b, c) {
  a + b * exp(-c * k)
}

# =====================================================================
# 2. LOAD STATION DATA
# =====================================================================
# IMPORTANT: Update this path to your specific station's results directory
station_folder <- "G:/My Drive/Academic_git/DownScaling/Marginals/QC_d data - Germany/Testing/"

final_summary_df <- readRDS(file.path(station_folder, "final_summary.rds"))
optimized_params <- readRDS(file.path(station_folder, "optimized_parameters.rds"))

# =====================================================================
# 3. EXTRACT EMPIRICAL DATA & ANCHOR
# =====================================================================
emp_data <- final_summary_df %>%
  select(k_hours, value = t2_pos) %>%
  filter(!is.na(value)) %>%
  mutate(Data_Type = ifelse(k_hours >= 24, "Calib. data", "Valid. data"))

k_star <- 24
q_k_star_t2 <- emp_data$value[emp_data$k_hours == k_star]
max_k <- max(emp_data$k_hours, na.rm = TRUE)

if(length(q_k_star_t2) == 0) stop("No 24h anchor found for t2_pos.")

k_smooth <- exp(seq(log(1), log(max_k), length.out = 500))

# =====================================================================
# 4. CALCULATE PREDICTED CURVES
# =====================================================================

# --- A. Direct Fit: Weibull 2p for t2 ---
param_W2p <- optimized_params %>% filter(Statistic == "t2_pos", Model == "Weibull_2p")
pred_direct_W2p <- H_W_2p(k_smooth, param_W2p$H0[1], k_star, q_k_star_t2, param_W2p$Param_a[1])

# --- B. Direct Fit: PowerLaw 2p for t2 ---
param_L2p <- optimized_params %>% filter(Statistic == "t2_pos", Model == "PowerLaw_2p")
pred_direct_L2p <- H_L_2p(k_smooth, param_L2p$H0[1], k_star, q_k_star_t2, param_L2p$Param_b[1])

# --- C. Indirect Fit: Derived from L2 / L1 ---
# L1 uses the Exponential Decay model
param_l1 <- optimized_params %>% filter(Statistic == "l1_pos", Model == "ExpDecay_3p")
# L2 uses the standard Power Decay model
param_l2 <- optimized_params %>% filter(Statistic == "l2_pos", Model == "PowerDecay_3p")

pred_l1 <- H_ExpDecay_3p(k_smooth, param_l1$Param_a[1], param_l1$Param_b[1], param_l1$Param_c[1])
pred_l2 <- H_PowerDecay(k_smooth, param_l2$Param_a[1], param_l2$Param_b[1], param_l2$Param_c[1])

# Derived t2
pred_indirect_t2 <- pred_l2 / pred_l1

# =====================================================================
# 5. PREPARE PLOTTING DATA
# =====================================================================

smooth_data <- data.frame(
  Scale_k = rep(k_smooth, 3),
  Model = c(rep("Direct: Weibull_2p", length(k_smooth)),
            rep("Direct: PowerLaw_2p", length(k_smooth)),
            rep("Indirect: L2/L1", length(k_smooth))),
  value = c(pred_direct_W2p, pred_direct_L2p, pred_indirect_t2)
) %>%
  filter(!is.na(value))

# =====================================================================
# 6. GENERATE COMPARISON PLOT
# =====================================================================

line_colors <- c(
  "Direct: Weibull_2p" = "blue", 
  "Direct: PowerLaw_2p" = "red",
  "Indirect: L2/L1" = "darkgreen"
)

line_types <- c(
  "Direct: Weibull_2p" = "dashed", 
  "Direct: PowerLaw_2p" = "dashed",
  "Indirect: L2/L1" = "solid"
)

custom_breaks <- c(1, 6, 12, 24, 120, 240)
custom_breaks <- custom_breaks[custom_breaks <= max_k] 

p_comparison <- ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = smooth_data, aes(x = Scale_k, y = value, color = Model, linetype = Model), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = emp_data, aes(x = k_hours, y = value, fill = Data_Type), 
             shape = 21, color = "white", size = 3, stroke = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 24, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_x_log10(breaks = custom_breaks, labels = custom_breaks) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Empirical Data", values = c("Calib. data" = "black", "Valid. data" = "orange")) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Fitted Models", values = line_colors) +
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "Fitted Models", values = line_types) +
  labs(
    title = expression("Comparison of Direct vs Indirect Fitting for" ~ t[2]^{(k)}),
    subtitle = "Comparing t2 direct optimization vs derived t2 = (predicted L2) / (predicted L1)",
    x = "Temporal scale, k [h]", 
    y = expression(t[2]^{(k)})
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_line(linetype = "dashed", color = "lightgray"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "vertical"
  )

print(p_comparison)

ggsave(file.path(station_folder, "t2_direct_vs_indirect_comparison_exp.png"), 
       p_comparison, width = 8, height = 6, bg = "white")
```
